name: ruby-mechanize
title: ruby-mechanize
summary: library used for automating interaction with websites
description:
library used for automating interaction with websites
This library is used for automating interaction with websites.
Mechanize automatically stores and sends cookies, follows redirects,
can follow links, and submit forms.  Form fields can be populated and
submitted.  Mechanize also keeps track of the sites that you have
visited as a history.
.
This library is loosely based on WWW::Mechanize for Perl.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-mechanize because library used for automating interaction with websites.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-mechanize as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-mechanize with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-mechanize --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
